t_ch: …也给诸位吃颗定心丸罢。各位还不知道「魔阴身」是什么，对么？
t_en: ...Though I'm sure a little reassurance wouldn't hurt. You don't know what being mara-struck actually means, do you?

t_ch: 医士认为，「魔阴身」与记忆有关。长生种虽有极其漫长的寿命，记忆的容量终有极限。
t_en: The healers believe that the mara-struck condition is related to memories. Unsurprisingly, long-life species have long lifespans, but there is a limit to the brain's capacity.

t_ch: 数百年，上千年过去，长生种能感受的情绪阈值不断提升，记忆也在天长日久的磨蚀下稀薄和厌倦，只留下了最极端、鲜明的沉淀。那几乎必定是痛苦和悔恨的回忆残渣……
t_en: After centuries and millennia, a long-life species' emotional threshold becomes higher and higher. Simultaneously, their memories fade and become dull under the erosion of time, leaving behind only the most extreme and vivid recollections, which are almost guaranteed to be memories full of anguish and regret...

t_ch: 明白么？长生种的结局，就是不再感受到快乐与幸福、只余下如伤痕般镌刻在心头的痛悔恨仇。在这些极端情绪下，身为人的自我开始崩溃…这便是「魔阴身」的开端。
t_en: Do you understand now? The fate of all long-life species is to no longer feel joy and happiness, left only with hatred and regret etched into the heart. Under such extreme conditions, a person's ego starts to crumble... and that is the beginning of the mara-struck condition.

t_ch: 短生种不必担心这些。你安心了吗？
t_en: Short-life species don't need to worry about this. Feel better?

t_ch: 啊，那我倒安心了，我正好什么都不记得。
t_en: Phew, I do — I never had memories to begin with.

t_ch: …不对，你还是不明白。魔阴身的病因不是记忆，而是情感的阈值被磨砺到…算了，你便当记忆听罢。
t_en: ...No, you still don't understand. The condition isn't caused by memories, but by the emotional threshold having been... Never mind. You can regard it as a memory issue.

t_ch: 药王秘传有多少人马？
t_en: How large are the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus's forces?

t_ch: 数目寥寥，多为受蛊惑的丹士和医者。他们虽然能驱使异兽战斗，或是以丹药自壮身躯…但说到底并不是云骑军的对手。也正因此，这些人才会想出散布妖雾的法子。
t_en: Only a handful of converted alchemists and healers. They can drive fantastic creatures into battle and strengthen their bodies with medicinal pellets... but they are no match for the Cloud Knights. That's why they decided to spread this demonic vapor.

t_ch: 实力对比如此悬殊，可他们却结束了潜伏，举事叛乱了。这不正常，这些人在等候什么转机……
t_en: There is a gulf in strength between us, yet still they emerged into the open and rebelled. Something isn't right. They must be waiting for some shift in fortune...

t_ch: 走了，不打扰你练习了。
t_en: I'll leave you to it.

t_ch: 一旦丹炉熄灭，烟气散去，本座立即赶来。
t_en: I will come at once when the crucibles are doused and the smoke dissipates.

t_ch: 快去吧。一旦丹炉熄灭，烟气散去，本座立即赶来。
t_en: Hurry. I will come at once when the crucibles are doused and the smoke dissipates.

t_ch: 炉身开始震动，原本冷却的丹炉中喷涌出烟雾。
t_en: The crucible starts to shake, and smoke emits out of the cold elixir crucible.

t_ch: 关…快关掉它！{NICKNAME}，你怎么把关闭的丹炉打开了？
t_en: T—Turn it off! {NICKNAME}, why did you turn it on!?

t_ch: 当心，有敌人来了！
t_en: Look out! Enemies incoming!

t_ch: 炉鼎上的符箓黯淡无光，丹炉静默。
t_en: The talismans on the elixir cauldron are dark and inactive. The elixir crucible lies silent.

t_ch: 你好奇地将手放在一枚古老的篆纹之上，炉身开始震动，烟霭腾空而起。
t_en: Curiously, you put your hand on an ancient engraving. The crucible begins to shake and smoke rises up towards the sky.

t_ch: 你是故意的吧！
t_en: Are you doing this on purpose!?

t_ch: 等等，咱们还没有关闭这些丹炉呢？！
t_en: Wait, we still haven't doused the burners!

t_ch: 那家伙以仙舟人的样貌潜伏行事，愚弄我等…真是可恶、可恶至极。
t_en: That impostor had the audacity to carry out her nefarious plans right under our noses... How utterly despicable.

t_ch: 更让人担心的是…还有多少反物质军团的卒子潜伏在仙舟之上？
t_en: What worries me more is... just how many more Antimatter saboteurs are at large?

t_ch: 关于停云…
t_en: About Tingyun...

t_ch: 这一切发生的太突然了…但杨叔说得对，回过头看，停云小姐是有不少古怪的地方，尤其对「丰饶」的造物过于感兴趣了。
t_en: It all happened so suddenly... but looking back, I think Mr. Yang was right. Tingyun was behaving strangely — she was fascinated with the Abundance's creations.

t_ch: 既然是天舶司派出的使节，显然天舶司中确有「停云」其人，放心，她的去向就由云骑军探查究竟。
t_en: Since she was an Amicassador dispatched by the Sky-Faring Commission, it's evident that there must indeed be a person with her name in the Commission. We'll have to let the Cloud Knights get to the bottom of what happened to the real Tingyun.

t_ch: 至于出现在我们身边的这位「停云」…正如瓦尔特先生所言，她表现出的阴毒与残忍正是为了扰乱我们的心神，切不可落入陷阱。
t_en: As for the "Tingyun" who accompanied us all that way, it's like what Mr. Yang said — her appearance was designed to sow seeds of doubt among us... we cannot allow ourselves to fall into her trap.

t_ch: 关于鳞渊境…
t_en: About Scalegorge Waterscape...

t_ch: 那本是持明族管理的洞天，据说是自持明故乡世界移栽而来的古海胜境。
t_en: It is a delve governed by the Vidyadhara — supposedly an ancient oceanic region transferred from the Vidyadhara home planet.

t_ch: 「建木」自从在大战中被斫断后，其根系盘虬，从未真正死灭。
t_en: After the Ambrosial Arbor was broken in two during the war, its roots were left gnarled and broken... yet it never died.

t_ch: 联盟决议，将建木封入了鳞渊境，并交由持明龙尊世代守望，意在借助持明龙裔的力量遏制建木。
t_en: The Alliance decided to seal the Arbor within Scalegorge Waterscape, entrust it to the high elders of the Vidyadhara, and rely on the power of Long's Scions to constrain it.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，当心哦。那些怪物的生命力可顽强了……
t_en: Be careful, {NICKNAME}. Those monsters are pretty tough...
Agh...

t_ch: 别动，让我好好瞧瞧……
t_en: Don't move. Let me have a look...

t_ch: 短生种的寿命转眼即逝，何必自蹈死路？
t_en: The lives of short-life species are so fleetingly brief. Why seek death?

t_ch: 你们来仙舟是为什么，想求得长生么？
t_en: Why did you come to the Xianzhou? To seek immortality?

t_ch: 用不着看景元的脸色！「药王秘传」可以给你们想要的！
t_en: You don't have to appease Jing Yuan! The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus can provide all that you desire!

t_ch: 时间过去太久了，也不知当年的封印是否仍在…就算在，恐怕也挡不住那个幽魂般的绝灭大君。
t_en: It has been so long — no one knows whether the seal remains... Even if it does, I doubt it will hinder that spectral Lord Ravager.

t_ch: 景元去哪里了？
t_en: Where is Jing Yuan?

t_ch: 我已将眼前的情况报知了神策府。
t_en: I've reported the current situation to the Seat of Divine Foresight.

t_ch: 他自从在穷观阵与我通话后，便再也没有音信，说是「有机缘要事，必须亲至」。
t_en: He made no further contact after we communicated at the Matrix of Prescience. He said he had "important matters to personally attend to."

t_ch: 情况已到了危如累卵的时刻，只能相信将军了……
t_en: The situation stands on the edge of a precipice. We must trust in the general...

t_ch: 事不宜迟，立刻出发吧。
t_en: Time is of the essence. Let's go.

t_ch: 前往「鳞渊境」
t_en: Head to Scalegorge Waterscape.

t_ch: 太卜大人，我也得跟着吗……
t_en: Master diviner, do I have to come...

t_ch: 喔，你也在啊…不巧，将军指名要你同几位客人同行，就受累走这一趟罢。
t_en: Oh, you're here too... Unfortunately, the general designated you to accompany our guests. So yes, you do.

t_ch: 受赐「建木」后，丹鼎司曾是罗浮仙舟最重要的司部。
t_en: After receiving the Ambrosial Arbor, the Alchemy Commission was once the Luofu's most vital commission.

t_ch: 可到最后，丹士们仍不满足，开始以操纵生命为乐。对「建木」的研究，就像饮鸩止渴…越深入，越渴望。
t_en: But in the end, the alchemists grew discontented and began to obsess over the manipulation of life. Research into the Arbor poisoned their minds... the more they pursued it, the more they longed for it.

t_ch: 唉，我总觉得，虽然长生种能活很久……
t_en: *sigh* I feel like... even though long-life species get to live forever...

t_ch: 但论烦恼和痛苦，和咱们这些短生种也没什么两样。
t_en: ...they aren't so different from us short-life species when it comes to worries and suffering.

t_ch: 人命关天。停云小姐，你回去吧，将军那儿我们解释。
t_en: Your life is more important, Miss Tingyun. Go back, we can explain to the general.

t_ch: 等等，停云小姐，你怎么还不回去！这里离丹炉很近了！
t_en: Wait, Miss Tingyun, why are you still here!? You're too close to the crucible!

t_ch: 承蒙关心，小女子没事～谁叫将军命令我跟着各位呢，可不敢违抗军令呀。
t_en: Thank you for the concern, but I'm fine~ The general commanded me to stay with you — I dare not go against military orders.

t_ch: 炉身渐渐停止震动，不停涌出的烟霭渐渐止息。
t_en: The crucible gradually stops shaking, and the smoke slowly ceases to pour out.

t_ch: 烟雾似乎变淡了一点……
t_en: Seems like the smoke is getting thinner...

t_ch: 哪有这么快。咱们得加紧脚步了。
t_en: Not thin enough. We need to hurry.

t_ch: 好嘞，完成了！这下烟雾瞧不见了。
t_en: Yay, we did it! Can't see the smoke anymore.

t_ch: 好…好极了。本座这就率军前来汇合。
t_en: E—Excellent. I'll lead my troops to the rendezvous.

s_en: Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
t_ch: 太卜，容我向您展示「仙人」们曾做到的事情。
t_en: Master Diviner, allow me to show you what the celestials were capable of.

s_en: Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
t_ch: 慈怀药王，听我呼召！
t_en: Merciful Medicus, hear my call!

s_en: Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
t_ch: 开凿形骸，控驭血肉！
t_en: Chisel out the form, control the flesh and bone!

s_en: Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
t_ch: 咦…为什么？她许诺过……
t_en: Uh...? How? She promised...

s_en: Master of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus
t_ch: 为何…为何如此？她明明说过……
t_en: Why... why? She said...

t_ch: 列位「恩公」，容我重新介绍——
t_en: Benefactors, allow me to reintroduce myself...

t_ch: 我是「绝灭大君」幻胧。
t_en: I am Lord Ravager Phantylia.

t_ch: 我来此，乃是让这仙舟分崩离析，自灭而亡！
t_en: I have come with a single purpose: To set in motion the self-destruction of the Xianzhou!

t_ch: 停云小姐是…军团的「绝灭大君」？！这、这到底是怎么回事啊？！
t_en: Miss Tingyun... is a Lord Ravager of the Antimatter Legion!? But— How can that be?

t_ch: 诸位，冷静！大敌当前，切不可乱了阵脚！
t_en: Keep calm, all of you! This is a formidable enemy — we have to stay together!

t_ch: 我嘛，是最不喜欢亲手制造毁灭的了……
t_en: They have no qualms about dealing out destruction by their own hand...

t_ch: （暂时停留）
t_en: (Stay here for now.)

t_ch: 还不行动吗？再迟恐怕情势有变。
t_en: Why are we still here? Things will change if we tarry too long.

t_ch: 真不必。嘻，小女子常年在宇宙中航行，别看年纪不小，实际满打满算也只有十几年阅历呢。
t_en: Hehe, there's really no need — I've spent my years traveling the universe! Not to mention, I'm younger and stronger than I look.

t_ch: 盯上仙舟的不是「焚风」，不是「星啸」，你们很幸运哦。
t_en: You are fortunate that Zephyro and Celenova never set their gaze upon the Xianzhou.

t_ch: 登上星槎，前方便是封印建木的洞天，「鳞渊境」。
t_en: We need to take a starskiff to Scalegorge Waterscape — the Ambrosial Arbor can be sealed from that delve.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我们现在就出发吧？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, let's make haste.

t_ch: 你是…！
t_en: You...!

t_ch: 可惜那位将军执意要我登台，幻胧也只得献丑一番。
t_en: But since that stubborn general of yours has forced me to take center stage, I'll make sure I steal the show.

t_ch: 该赴约了，请容我先行告退，希望你们能同这些戏子…玩得开心。
t_en: Haha... My apologies for leaving so soon, but I have an appointment to keep. I'm sure my friends here will be happy to entertain you...

t_ch: 丹鼎司中，战事暂止。
t_en: The fighting has stopped for the moment at the Alchemy Commission

t_ch: 与此同时，载着丹恒、素裳与罗刹的小舟姗姗来迟，停靠此处…
t_en: Meanwhile, the ship carrying Dan Heng, Sushang, and Luocha finally arrives nearby...

t_ch: 唔，这里是……
t_en: Uh, this is...

t_ch: 丹鼎司。
t_en: The Alchemy Commission.

t_ch: 毗邻鳞渊境的洞天。
t_en: The delve bordering Scalegorge Waterscape.

t_ch: 咦，你倒是很熟嘛……
t_en: Huh? You're pretty familiar with this place.

t_ch: 嗯，是丹鼎司没错，难怪船半路上断断续续收到几条军令，说云骑在此集结，想必是为了解决星核的问题。
t_en: Yep, it's the Alchemy Commission. No wonder we were getting those military broadcasts on the way over — something about the Cloud Knights gathering here, right? They're probably coming to fix the Stellaron problem.

t_ch: 终于！走了这一路，终于能见着云骑的影子。可算归队了！
t_en: *sigh* It's been such a long journey, but now we're finally gonna meet some Cloud Knights! I'll be back with my unit!

t_ch: 我没骗你们吧？说把你们带到安全的地方，就言出必践！虽然…绕了点远路……
t_en: I didn't lie to you, right? I told you I'd bring you somewhere safe, and I did! Though... we did take a bit of a detour...

t_ch: 我去星槎海前，曾找一位卜者测算此次出行的吉凶。他说「随而有获」，让我不必在意去向，只要随波逐流，便能有所收获。
t_en: Before I arrived in Starskiff Haven, I had a diviner read my fortune for the journey ahead. He told me not to be concerned with the destination, but to seize my chances and travel with the current to reap the greatest harvest.

t_ch: 就是说，谢谢素裳姑娘了。
t_en: Meaning thank you, Miss Sushang.

t_ch: 哦…好吧，我去向这儿的云骑长官报备了。
t_en: Oh... okay. Well, I'm gonna go report to the nearest captain.

t_ch: 你们在这附近转转吧，可别乱跑，一会儿会有云骑来送你们回去。有缘再见啦！
t_en: You guys can hang around here, but don't run off too far — there'll be Cloud Knights coming to escort you back soon. Bye for now!

t_ch: …呃，什么意思。
t_en: ...Meaning?

t_ch: 这持明协助建造的丹炉中均存有云吟术，少主可借此多加体会……
t_en: All the elixir crucibles that the Vidyadhara helped to construct contain cloudhymn magic. You should take this chance to learn more, young master...

t_ch: 是么？我不借机关便可御水，体会又有何用？
t_en: Huh? But I don't need any sort of device to help me command water, what more is there to learn?

t_ch: 您是受选之人，资质不可限量，但云吟术毕竟是基础……
t_en: You are indeed the chosen one, with endless potential... yet cloudhymn magic is just the beginning.

t_ch: 持明蜃影…这些过去的影子还没有消散吗？
t_en: A Vidyadhara Mirage Echo... Have these shadows of the past yet to disperse?

t_ch: 他来了。
t_en: He's here.

t_ch: 嗯，时间正好。
t_en: Mm, right on time.

t_ch: …那些情绪出现了，卡芙卡，我感觉到了。又是这种感觉！这种……
t_en: ...That feeling, Kafka — it's welling up within me. That feeling! I—It's...

t_ch: 那就释放吧，「魔阴身」……
t_en: Don't resist. Let the mara strike you...

t_ch: 你来了。
t_en: You're here.

t_ch: 该是偿还代价的时候了！时候到了！！
t_en: *laughing in madness* It's time to pay the price! It's time!!!

t_ch: 你以为变成这副样子就能逃得掉么？！逃得掉么……
t_en: You think changing form will help you escape!? Escape...

t_ch: 我已经和你，还有那个女人说过很多遍了…我是「丹恒」。
t_en: I have told you and that woman many times... I am Dan Heng.

t_ch: 我和你们的过去毫无瓜葛。
t_en: I have nothing to do with your past.

t_ch: 丹恒…你以为换上另一副面貌，改成另一个身份，往日的罪孽就能一笔勾销了？你…你甚至连「死」都没有经受过……
t_en: Dan Heng... You think another name and face can blot out the sin of your past? You... You didn't even experience death...

t_ch: 要让你感受这种痛苦，「丹恒」，我要让你知道「死」的痛苦！
t_en: I will force this suffering upon you, "Dan Heng." You will know the pain of death!

t_ch: 啊，那可不行。
t_en: Hmph, not on my watch.

t_ch: 今天你谁也杀不了，通缉犯，因为你得跟我走。
t_en: You're not murdering anyone today, fugitive. You're coming with me.

t_ch: 景元的跟班小子…景元没教你审时度势么……
t_en: Jing Yuan's lapdog... Did the general not teach you to choose your battles wisely...?

t_ch: 喂，你快走远些。待会儿刀剑无眼——咦？
t_en: Hey, move back. Things are about to... Huh?

t_ch: 你的模样，有点眼熟啊……
t_en: You... you look so familiar...

t_ch: 小心！
t_en: Look out!

t_ch: 好了，各位，<color=#dbc291ff>听我说</color>：住手吧。
t_en: All of you, <color=#dbc291ff>listen to me</color> — stop.

t_ch: …你刚刚做了什么？
t_en: ...What did you do?

t_ch: 只是一点准备工作，好迎接大人物的大驾光临——总不能让堂堂罗浮将军，看我家阿刃和你们两个的笑话呀。
t_en: I'm just clearing the stage for the grand entrance — can't have you three misbehaving in front of the Luofu's hotshot general.

t_ch: 哈哈哈。
t_en: Haha.

t_ch: 景元……
t_en: Jing Yuan...

t_ch: 将军！
t_en: General!

t_ch: 二位久别重回仙舟，却总是在些尴尬的场合。如念故人之交，应该早些通知我才是。
t_en: Many years have passed since the two of you departed the Xianzhou, and yet the circumstances of your return appear to be equally unhappy. If you still thought of me as a friend, you should've forewarned me.

t_ch: 我要做的事已经完了。
t_en: My task is complete.

t_ch: 嗯，完了。
t_en: Mm, that it is.

t_ch: 你们帮了仙舟一个小忙，我很感谢。带这人走吧，这一次，我可以当做没看见。
t_en: Thank you for assisting the Xianzhou in this small matter. Take this person away — I will pretend I didn't see anything this time.

t_ch: 将军？！我……
t_en: General!? I...

t_ch: 好久不见了…老朋友。
t_en: It has been a long time... old friend.

t_ch: 我不是他。
t_en: I'm not him.

t_ch: 嗯…抱歉。
t_en: Mm... I'm sorry.

t_ch: 你还不能走，因为你的列车朋友们正在「鳞渊境」里等你呢。咱们一同去见见吧？
t_en: You cannot leave yet — your Astral Express friends are waiting for you in Scalegorge Waterscape. Shall we go and see them together?

t_ch: 现在不是说这个的时候。
t_en: Now is not the time.

t_ch: 如何，阿刃，你满意了吗？
t_en: Well, Bladie? Are you satisfied?

t_ch: 哼。
t_en: Hmph.

t_ch: 「药王秘传」在丹鼎司发动叛乱，目前正处于云骑军的节制下。各处都不太安全，请暂时留在这儿。
t_en: The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus started a rebellion in the Alchemy Commission — the Cloud Knights have the area locked down. It's not safe, please remain here for now.

t_ch: 等行动结束，我们会派专人护送你们返回的。
t_en: We will send someone to escort you back once the operation is over.

t_ch: 「药王秘传」？
t_en: Disciples of Sanctus Medicus?

t_ch: 一群疯子。你瞧见「建木」了对吧？听说这便是那些妖人干的好事。事关军机，我也不便多谈。
t_en: Lunatics — all of them. You saw the Ambrosial Arbor, I assume? I heard that's the work of those sorcerers. Still, I can't say too much — military secrets.

t_ch: （建木重生，与药王秘传作乱有关…上一次听到这些名字，那是什么时候了？）
t_en: (The Arbor's resurrection is connected to the Disciples' rebellion... I've heard those names before, but when?)

t_ch: （{NICKNAME}他们怎么会卷入这么麻烦的事情里……）
t_en: (How did {NICKNAME} and the others get drawn into all this...?)

t_ch: 有没有见过几个化外民？
t_en: Have you seen any outworlders?

t_ch: （丹恒向队长简单描述了三月七等人的外貌。）
t_en: (Dan Heng briefly described to the captain the appearances of March 7th and the crew.)

t_ch: 见过，那是将军请来的客人啊。他们是你的朋友？
t_en: You must be talking about the general's guests. Are they your friends?

t_ch: 巧了么这不是，这几位刚随太卜大人一同出征。多亏了他们奋勇先行，云骑弟兄们才不用受云霞紫府的毒气所害。
t_en: What a coincidence — they left with the master diviner not long ago. It's all thanks to their courageous work that the Knights don't have to worry about the poison in Evemist Mansion.

t_ch: 我已收到了前方捷报，应该要不了多久他们就会回来吧？
t_en: I received the good news from the front lines. They'll probably be back soon.

t_ch: 多谢，我没问题了。
t_en: Thanks. That's all I wanted to know.

t_ch: 怪了，我看你有点眼熟…算了，最近变故太多，我脑子都乱了。
t_en: Strange, you seem oddly familiar to me... Never mind, too many misfortunes recently — I can hardly think straight.

t_ch: 怎么啦？
t_en: What's up?

t_ch: 我得走了。
t_en: I need to go.

t_ch: 走？你现在能去哪儿啊？罗浮还在封锁中，云骑军的行动还没结束呢。
t_en: Go? Go where? The Luofu is under lockdown — the Cloud Knights' operation isn't over yet.

t_ch: 别急，等战事落定，我亲自送你和罗刹先生回家～
t_en: Relax. When the fight is over, I'll personally escort you and Mr. Luocha home~

t_ch: 不，没什么…
t_en: Nothing...

t_ch: 别担心。等战事落定，我亲自送你和罗刹先生回家～
t_en: Don't worry. Once the fight is over, I'll personally escort you and Mr. Luocha home~

t_ch: 丹恒兄很久没回故乡了吧？
t_en: You haven't been back home for a long time, have you Master Dan Heng?

t_ch: （说谎）这儿不是我的故乡。
t_en: (Lie) This isn't my home.

t_ch: 啊…是吗？抱歉。
t_en: Ah... is that so? Apologies.

t_ch: 你怎么知道…
t_en: How did you know...

t_ch: 所谓「近乡情怯」，你的眼神很诚实。
t_en: As home draws nearer, so our feelings grow stronger. I can see it in your eyes.

t_ch: 想走吗？那就趁现在吧。
t_en: Do you want to leave? Then do it now.

t_ch: 云骑军很快就会检查你我的身份。我也有要去的地方，此地不宜久留。
t_en: The Cloud Knights will soon check our identities. I have somewhere else to be — I've tarried here too long.

t_ch: 你…要去哪里？
t_en: ...Where are you going?

t_ch: 我是行商啊，还有一笔交易没做完呢。
t_en: I'm a traveling merchant. I have one more deal to see through.

t_ch: 前方捷报！云霞紫府那边的「药王秘传」歹人已全数歼灭。
t_en: Good news from the front lines! The Disciples over at Evemist Mansion have been defeated.

t_ch: 据说星槎通航正在恢复，滞留在丹鼎司的人很快就能回去了。
t_en: I heard that starskiff connections are being reinstated. The people stranded at the Alchemy Commission should all be able to leave soon.

t_ch: 那些异邦人竟然胜了「药王秘传」，这岂不显得我们毫无作为？
t_en: Those Travelers defeated the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus... Won't that make us seem... incompetent?

t_ch: 这、这战报该如何写才能显我军威风啊…？
t_en: I—I need to find a way to make this report sound more... impressive.

t_ch: 亏得有义士帮助，咱们才能渡过难关。将军请来的这些客人，莫非是曾经名声赫赫的「巡海游侠」？
t_en: Thanks to those heroes I managed to pull through. Could those guests of the general be the Galaxy Rangers of old?

t_ch: 魁首大人败了？怎么可能…怎么可能怎么可能！
t_en: The master was defeated? No... N—No that cannot be!

t_ch: 魁首大人的失败，定是因为心志不坚，无法唤来药王的庇佑。
t_en: The master must have failed to summon the protection of Sanctus Medicus — her will must have wavered.

t_ch: 你们等着瞧，我会…让你们见识药王的恩赐。
t_en: Just you wait — I'll show you the blessing of Sanctus Medicus.

t_ch: （现在不是回去的时候。若被云骑缠住，恐怕就赶不上他们了。）
t_en: (Now's not the time to turn back. If the Cloud Knights hold me up, I won't reach them in time.)

t_ch: （看来这条道已被云骑军把守住了，得另寻出处离开…）
t_en: (Seems this road is guarded by the Cloud Knights. I need to find another way...)

t_ch: （我得小心行事，以免引起云骑的警惕，若有人对我好奇…）
t_en: (I need to be careful. If I alert the Knights, they might take an interest in me...)

t_ch: 他们说你是真龙再传，真的吗？
t_en: They say that you are Long's power incarnate. Is that true?
Hmph...

t_ch: 龙…
t_en: Aargh... Long...

t_ch: 如今的我已被逐出仙舟，不再是「不朽」的龙裔了。
t_en: I was exiled from the Xianzhou. I am no longer one of the Scions of Permanence.

t_ch: 您独当一面的时候，我怕是看不到了…
t_en: I doubt I will be here to see you take charge...

t_ch: 不必伤心，持明一族生灭循环，常存此世。
t_en: No need to feel aggrieved. Vidyadhara go through cycles of life and death, existing forever in this world.

t_ch: 待您成为龙尊时，我多半已蜕生成了小娃娃，望您好生照拂。
t_en: By the time you are the high elder, my hatching rebirth will be complete and I will be a child once again. Please take care of me.

t_ch: 这股澎湃的力量…您是…是龙尊大人回来了。
t_en: This surging power... It's you... You've returned, High Elder.

t_ch: 鳞渊境中正在发生可怕的事情。请不要再前进了，您的敌人…您的敌人在等您。
t_en: Something terrible is happening in Scalegorge Waterscape. Please don't go any further... Your enemies... Your enemies are waiting for you.

t_ch: 抱歉，我不能在此驻足。我的朋友已经离开了，我必须追上他们。
t_en: I'm sorry, I cannot linger here. My friends have left — I must find them.

t_ch: 您依然一意孤行啊，您不肯听我们的…就像当年那样。
t_en: You didn't heed us then, and won't heed us now... as headstrong as you always were.

t_ch: 那么，前往鳞渊境的船就在岸边，请您登上它吧。
t_en: It seems you already made your decision. There is a vessel bound for Scalegorge Waterscape located ahead.
...Huh?

t_ch: （永远接不通的消息…真麻烦。也不知{NICKNAME}，三月和杨叔那边发生了什么……）
t_en: (The messages never get sent... I wonder what's happening with those three?)

t_ch: （云骑军似乎正在为了星核灾变而集结…但卡芙卡为什么要我们过来？他们怎么样了，刃又怎么样了？）
t_en: (The Cloud Knights seem to be gathering for the Stellaron disaster... but why did Kafka want us to come here? What happened to them? And what happened to Blade?)

t_ch: （耽搁的时间太久了，需要情报……）
t_en: (I've delayed for too long. I need more information...)

t_ch: （抱歉了，两位，我必须赶上我的朋友，这一路来多谢照顾了……）
t_en: (I'm sorry, I have to catch up to my friends. Thank you for looking out for me on this journey, both of you...)

t_ch: 好大好高的鼎。
t_en: What a huge cauldron.

t_ch: 这太真鼎是以我持明族的云吟术驱动，汲饮古海之水，如鲸吞虹吸，炼化丹药……
t_en: This aureate cauldron is driven by the cloudhymn magic of our people — the Vidyadhara. It drinks the water of the ancient sea like a whale swallows the tide, and refines it into medicinal pellets...

t_ch: 这些回忆…
t_en: These memories...

t_ch: 不，这些事情都与我无关了。
t_en: No. They have nothing to do with me anymore.

t_ch: 应星、饮月…你们逃得够久了，也该回幽囚狱啦。
t_en: Yingxing, Imbibitor Lunae... You've been running for too long. It's time to go back to The Shackling Prison!

t_ch: 住手！我不想和你生死相搏！
t_en: Stay your hand! I have no wish to harm you!

t_ch: …阿刃，<color=#dbc291ff>听我说</color>：你已经回来了。
t_en: ... Bladie, <color=#dbc291ff>listen</color>: You're back.

t_ch: …还没！卡芙卡，还没！
t_en: ...Not yet, Kafka! Not yet!

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>听我说</color>：冷静一点。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Listen</color>: Calm down.
...Yes.

t_ch: 呼剑如影！
t_en: Edged companion!

t_ch: 这一手…你也是那个女人的徒弟！又是她！
t_en: That move... You're also one of her apprentices! It's her again!

t_ch: ——刃！控制住！别去想她！
t_en: Blade! Control yourself! Don't think about her!

t_ch: 别得意，不过是折我一柄飞剑罢了。
t_en: Smile all you like — that wasn't the only sword in the air.

t_ch: 彦卿绝不会令将军失望！
t_en: I won't fail the general!

t_ch: 稍早些时候…
t_en: A little while ago...

t_ch: 「波月古海，殊胜妙境」，这鳞渊境的景色同上次亲睹时一样，未曾变改。而如今站在这里的你我，却各自不同了。可见即使肉身不朽的长生种，也无法与天地并举。
t_en: Lunarescent Depths — a realm of singular beauty. Scalegorge Waterscape is the same as when I last laid eyes on it... and here we stand so different from one another. The flesh of long-life species may be immortal, but the constant of heaven and earth eludes them.

t_ch: 将军应该知道持明轮回蜕生的习性。古海之水已涤尽了<color=#dbc291ff>丹枫</color>的罪愆。当初与你共同站在这里的人，已经不在了。
t_en: You know the Vidyadhara hatching rebirth cycle, general. The waters of the ancient sea have cleansed <color=#dbc291ff>Dan Feng</color> of his past sin. The person that once stood here alongside you is no more.

t_ch: 我是<color=#dbc291ff>丹恒</color>。那位<color=#dbc291ff>丹枫</color>是英雄也好，罪人也罢，都与我无关。我已承担了他的刑罚，接受永久的放逐——这我没有怨言，但将军看我时，请务必弃去过去的影子。
t_en: I am <color=#dbc291ff>Dan Heng</color>. Whether <color=#dbc291ff>Dan Feng</color> was hero or villain has nothing to do with me. I bore his punishment, accepted my eternal banishment without complaint... but do not let his shadow cloud your estimation of me, general.

t_ch: 啊，重提旧事就像搅浑一潭浊水，徒然惹引不快。大概是你的模样…大概是那龙角，依稀仿佛的龙尊气质，总让我把你和故人联系起来吧。
t_en: *sigh* Raising old nets only darkens the water — an exercise in unhappiness. Perhaps it is your visage, the horns on your head, or the unmistakable air of the high elder that makes the separation nigh impossible for me.

t_ch: …我已说过——
t_en: ...I already told you—

t_ch: 是的，你说了，那又如何？若用一句话就能改变他人对自己的态度，世上也就没那么多争端了。你要我不再视你为<color=#dbc291ff>丹枫</color>，可以，为我做一件事。
t_en: You did... but to what effect? If words alone were enough to change the heart, this world would be without quarrel. If you wish to rid me of the illusion of <color=#dbc291ff>Dan Feng</color>, you must do something for me.

t_ch: 以<color=#dbc291ff>丹枫</color>的身份帮我最后一个忙，此间事毕，我就由他死去，撤销对你的放逐令。往后我可以保证：至少在罗浮之上，你不再是任何人的影子。
t_en: Before I can let <color=#dbc291ff>Dan Feng</color> die and revoke your banishment edict, I need him to do me one final favor. I can guarantee you that when it is done, you will no longer walk in anyone's shadow aboard the Luofu.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>丹枫</color>能做到的事情，我未必做得到。
t_en: I may not be capable of the things that <color=#dbc291ff>Dan Feng</color> was capable of.

t_ch: 你必须做到，不然一切许诺都不作数。要怪就怪你的前世吧，若不是他当初做了那件混账事，若化龙之力能够完整传承，我根本用不着逼你。
t_en: You must do it, or my promise will count for naught. If you wish to blame someone, blame your previous incarnation. Had he not committed that terrible sin — had the power of dragon transmutation been passed on intact — I would have no need to compel you.

t_ch: 方才说过：今天站在这里的你我，各自不同。<color=#dbc291ff>丹枫</color>不再，只有<color=#dbc291ff>丹恒</color>。而我……
t_en: It is as I said: Here we stand so different from one another. <color=#dbc291ff>Dan Feng</color> is no more — now there is only <color=#dbc291ff>Dan Heng</color>. But I...

t_ch: 我已是罗浮将军，有些事纵使不情愿，也仍然要去做的。
t_en: I am the general of the Luofu. There are things that I wish I did not have to do, and yet I must.

t_ch: 聊些高兴的话题吧。你在列车上结交的朋友，眼下正在此间，不想见上一面吗？
t_en: Haha, let us talk of happier tidings. The friends you made on the Express are here. Do you wish to see them?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，三月和杨叔…你把他们带到这儿来了？！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, March, Mr. Yang... You brought them here!?

t_ch: 对，就在前方的「显龙大雩殿」上。
t_en: Yes, they are waiting in the Dragonvista Rain Hall.

t_ch: 走吧，你的朋友们在等着你呢。
t_en: Go, your friends are waiting for you.

t_ch: 看，你的朋友正在和军团的爪牙作战…
t_en: Look, your friends are taking the fight to the Legion as we speak...

t_ch: 加快脚步，帮他们一把。
t_en: We need to help them, let's go.

t_ch: 景元！你可算是来了！
t_en: Jing Yuan! Where have you been!?

t_ch: 哈哈，我来迟了，这一路多亏符卿的撑持。神策府送来的战报我已收到，至于幻胧的计划么……
t_en: Haha, forgive my late arrival, Lady Fu — we are indebted to you and your forces. The Seat of Divine Foresight relayed the battle reports to me. As for Phantylia's plan...

t_ch: 「建木」，最大的异象就在那里。
t_en: The Ambrosial Arbor — that's her focus.

t_ch: 据说绝灭大君幻胧的手段是令事物内乱自亡。她定是想要染指建木，广播寿瘟祸祖之力…将罗浮变成不死孽物横行的泥犁地狱。
t_en: Lord Ravager Phantylia's strategy was to create civil strife — then let it consume the Xianzhou from within. She wanted to use the Arbor to disseminate the power of the Plagues Author... and turn the Luofu into a hell of undying abominations.

t_ch: 嗯，我已有分晓。列车团的各位，我带来了一个人，你们一定想见见他。
t_en: Mm, that is clear to me now. Friends of the Astral Express, I have brought someone with me whom I think you'll be eager to see.

t_ch: 你、你是…丹恒？！不会吧……
t_en: Huh? I—Is that... Dan Heng!? You...

t_ch: 你…是丹恒对吧？你头上这对角是怎么回事……
t_en: Y—You are Dan Heng, right? What's with the horns...?

t_ch: 说来话长，三月。是我。
t_en: It's a long story, March. It's me.

t_ch: 不是，你还真有隐藏的力量啊？！
t_en: So... you do have secret strength!?

t_ch: 好了，朋友叙旧的事且先放一放罢。
t_en: Let us save such reminiscence for later, shall we?

t_ch: 诸位抵达罗浮时曾言列车团是为解决星核灾变而来，那时景元未敢应承，因为怀疑星核猎手另有图谋；如今看来，倒是我过度忧虑了。
t_en: My astral guests, when you first appeared on the Luofu, your stated aim was the resolution of the Stellaron crisis. I was concerned that the Stellaron Hunters harbored ulterior motives and refused your offer. I see now that I was overly anxious.

t_ch: 星核猎手确有图谋不假，哈哈，她把各位送来，故意把事态扩大，好让各位与仙舟并肩作战。事到如今，诸位的诚意已无可置疑…罗浮欠诸位一份感激，本不该再有索求。
t_en: Nevertheless, it is true that the motives of the Stellaron Hunters were not what they appeared, haha. In order that the Express and the Xianzhou fight side by side, Kafka lured you here and broadened the scope of the crisis... In doing so, she succeeded in making clear that your sincerity is beyond doubt. The Luofu is in your debt, and I have no right to seek further assistance from you.

t_ch: 但诚如符卿所说，幻胧的出现令事态不再可控。身为罗浮将军，我不得不借丹恒的力量，也要请各位全力相助。
t_en: However, as Lady Fu has explained, the appearance of Phantylia means that the situation is far from under our control. As general of the Luofu, it would be foolish of me not to ask Dan Heng and the rest of you for your strength at this critical moment.

t_ch: 罗浮之危机就算与星核无关，以我的个性也不会坐视不理。但我一人的意愿，并不能代表星穹列车。
t_en: Even if the crisis on the Luofu had nothing to do with the Stellaron, I would be willing to help... but I can't speak for the other members of my crew.

t_ch: 探索、了解、建立、连结…列车团奉行的开拓信条，不外乎八个字。旅途艰险，要贯彻它们却难于登天。
t_en: Explore, understand, establish, and connect... As the crew of the Express, that's the trailblaze creed we follow. Still, when the journey gets tough, those words can feel far-off.

t_ch: 畏惧、险境、敌人、死亡…种种阻碍横亘在旅途上，能走下去的无名客屈指可数。
t_en: Fear, risk, enemies, and death are the obstacles we face in pursuit of the creed. That's why the Nameless who are able to stay the course number few indeed.

t_ch: 前进也好，离开也罢，无名客的目的地应该由他们自己选择…就像在列车上决定目的地时，亲手投出那一票一样。
t_en: Whether our destination lies before us or behind us, the decision is ours to make. Here, as on the Express, every vote counts.

t_ch: 丹恒，你…？
t_en: Dan Heng...?

t_ch: （伸出手）
t_en: (Hold out hand)

t_ch: 谢谢你，丹恒。
t_en: Thank you, Dan Heng.

t_ch: （不伸出手）
t_en: (Remain still)

t_ch: 我不勉强，丹恒。
t_en: The choice is yours, Dan Heng.

t_ch: 我并非以无名客的身份站在这里。因为此行的来去，我受人摆布，并无自由可言……
t_en: How am I still one of the Nameless? I stand here at the mercy of others without true freedom to speak...

t_ch: 但我会以持明后裔的身份，完成我对罗浮的责任。
t_en: ...but as a descendant of the Vidyadhara, I will fulfill my duty to the Luofu.

t_ch: 好啊，大家和来时一样深明大义。那么，接下来将军有什么妙计？
t_en: Great! Everyone's just as heroic as when they arrived. So, what's the master plan, general?

t_ch: 妙计没有，只有赌一把。赌持明长老的半截褪鳞之术，赌丹恒还能拾回龙尊的记忆……
t_en: There is no master plan, only a bet... a bet on the senior Vidyadhara's incomplete exuviation charm, and on Dan Heng's ability to access the memories of the high elder...

t_ch: 龙尊？
t_en: High elder?

t_ch: 当年，「建木」虽被帝弓司命斫断，寿瘟祸祖的诅咒仍有少许残留。为了将之封印，罗浮请动「不朽」龙裔的力量，使驯服「建木」残骸成了可能。
t_en: When the Reignbow Arbiter severed the Ambrosial Arbor, remnants of the curse of the Plagues Author lingered. In order to make the stemming of those remnants a possibility, the Luofu invoked the power of the Scions of Permanence.

t_ch: 在古代龙尊的主持下，持明族导引古海之水，淹没鳞渊境洞天，将它作为封存「建木」的容器。为了纪念如此壮举和牺牲，仙舟联盟在鳞渊境中竖起显龙大雩碑，留下持明的造像。
t_en: Under the direction of the high elder, the Vidyadhara guided the waters of the ancient sea to flood the Scalegorge Waterscape delve and contain the Arbor. To commemorate this magnificent feat and sacrifice, the Alliance erected the Dragonvista Rain Monument — a Vidyadhara statue.

t_ch: 这雕像好像丹恒啊，难道说……
t_en: It looks so much like Dan Heng... I wonder if...

t_ch: 雕像上那人就是……
t_en: The statue... is that...

t_ch: 丹恒的兄弟！
t_en: ...Dan Heng's brother!?

t_ch: 哈，少许相似罢了，那是很久以前的事啦。硬要说起来，历代龙尊的形象确实相差无几——本代除外。现在持明龙尊的继任者只是个袭名的小娃娃，没有继承全部的力量。
t_en: Ha, I see why you might think so. These events occurred a long time ago, yet successive generations of high elders have not differed greatly in their appearance... that is, until the current generation. The most recent successor did not inherit the same level of power, and their appearance is that of a child.

t_ch: 丹恒，你明白了吗？丹枫死后，罗浮的持明已没有能办到此事的人了。曾守望建木的你，应该能为我们开启前往「建木」的道路。
t_en: Do you understand, Dan Heng? Since Dan Feng perished, the Luofu Vidyadhara have no longer had an individual capable of performing such feats. But you, who once kept watch over the Arbor, should be able to open a way through to that great tree.

t_ch: 接下来，就要看你的了。
t_en: What happens next, is in your hands.

t_ch: 描绘龙尊形象的石雕早已历尽风蚀沧桑，靠近底座处镌刻了一行小字。
t_en: The statue of the High Elder has been greatly changed by years of weathering. There are small words engraved near its base.

t_ch: 「为止若木苏生，孽寇侵陵，祷而引古海之水掩覆洞天，镇伏玄根。勒石铭之，垂鉴后世，万勿擅移……」
t_en: "Hearken, as arbor revives and foe nears, we call forth the mighty waters of ancient sea, to flood abodes of heaven and quell roots of evil. We etch this in stone for all to heed."

t_ch: 感应此地的力量…
t_en: Try to feel the great power here...

t_ch: 万顷波涛之下，古老的建木玄根躁动蔓生，犹如一头伏形千年，大梦初醒的兽。
t_en: Beneath the endless rolling waves, the ancient roots of the arbor blaze. Long dormant, they stir and come to life, as if a beast were waking from its strife.

t_ch: 那些由历任持明龙尊所编织的禁制，那些驯驭、分散巨兽力量的缠结，构成了一张衰朽将破的罗网，脱落在即。
t_en: The containment mechanisms woven by past thrones, the bindings that tamed the beasts' power known, a fragile net, soon to shatter and fall, its decay a warning, heard by one and all.

t_ch: 过去的记忆自黑暗中浮现，紧紧攫住了你……
t_en: Memories from the past emerge from the darkness, tightly gripping you...

t_ch: （放弃）
t_en: (Give up)

t_ch: 我提防着丰饶孽物、星核猎手、药王秘传…可千算万算，终是没料到「反物质军团」的出现。
t_en: I have been keeping careful watch against the Abominations of Abundance, the Stellaron Hunters, and the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus... but I never anticipated the Antimatter Legion.

t_ch: 巡猎未已，又要同邪魔交战…哼哼，此役之后，不论罗浮存在与否，联盟必与军团不死不休。
t_en: The Hunt is far from over, yet all the while we find ourselves at war with other evil spirits... Hmph, from this battle onward, the Alliance must fight the Legion to our dying breath, even if it means the end of the Luofu.

t_ch: 军团从未对联盟出手。在情报里，他们是一群疯狂破坏的战争机器。大意啦，七大君各自的军团都有鲜明的风格，真不好办。
t_en: Our intelligence tells us that the Legion are a mad and destructive war machine, yet they never took up arms against the Alliance. The armies of the Seven Ravagers all have their own means of destruction — they are not to be taken lightly.

t_ch: 「幻胧」大君喜爱事物自身的内部崩解，所以炮制了星核之乱，撺掇药王秘传走上前台。如今阴谋败露，她不得不亲自下场。不对，此举不符合她的毁灭美学。幻胧必有后着……
t_en: Lord Ravager Phantylia favors internal collapse, which is why she masterminded the Stellaron crisis and urged the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus out of the shadows. Now that her plot has been laid bare she has no choice but to retreat... and yet that hardly suits her philosophy of destruction. There must be something more...

t_ch: 你知道吗？当初丹枫犯下重罪，十王司力主将你毁去。持明呢，半数赞同，半数反对。哈哈，因为化龙传承只完成了一半。持明长老恨极了你，却又不敢杀你。
t_en: Do you know something? When Dan Feng committed his great crime, the Ten-Lords Commission advocated strongly for him to be destroyed. The Vidyadhara, on the other hand, were split evenly in their favor and disfavor of the motion. Haha, the dragon transmutation inheritance was not intact, after all. The senior Vidyadhara hated you, yet did not dare to kill you.

t_ch: 为了对十王司和天舶司有个交代，迫于压力，他们还是对丹枫执行了强制褪鳞之术，不过，故意留下了一道瑕疵。长老以为能瞒得过十王司，哼，好个如意算盘，但纸是包不住火的……
t_en: The Vidyadhara were under great pressure. In order to placate the Ten-Lords and Sky-Faring Commissions, they performed an exuviation charm on Dan Feng against his will. Still, they ensured that the charm contained a flaw, thinking that this would fool the Ten-Lords Commission. Hmph, the senior Vidyadhara were sure of their scheme, but you cannot hide fire with paper.

t_ch: 依古籍所载，这泓水体是我族自故乡带出的「汤海」的一部分，无染无垢。
t_en: As recorded in the ancient texts, this body of water was brought by my people from our home world — it formed part of the Roiling Deep. It is as pure here as it was there.

t_ch: 龙祖以生命之水化育我等，赐予持明不朽。我等出于此处，亦当回归此处。
t_en: Our dragon ancestors nurtured us with the water of life and bestowed us with the permanence of the Vidyadhara.

t_ch: 古海之水，澡洁吾心；古海之水，疗护吾身。
t_en: Waters of the ancient sea, cleanse me, waters of the ancient sea, protect me...

t_ch: 此世善缘，俱已完纳；此生恶业，悉已净空。
t_en: This world's good karma is settled. This life's misfortune is erased.

t_ch: 她蜕生了…抛下我独自一人。
t_en: Her hatching rebirth is complete... she left me all alone.

t_ch: 但我却依旧要等待蜕生降临的那一日，等上许久许久……
t_en: Still, I wait for the day of my rebirth... endless waiting...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}与你对视一眼，互相沉默了起来。
t_en: {NICKNAME} looks at you, as you both become silent.

t_ch: 你就没什么想问的吗？
t_en: Is there nothing you'd like to ask?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}摇了摇头。{F#她}{M#他}不想说话时，谁也没法让{F#她}{M#他}开口。
t_en: {NICKNAME} shakes {M#his}{F#her} head. {M#He}{F#She} doesn't want to speak. Nobody can get {M#him}{F#her} to open up.

t_ch: 你真是吓我一跳。还以为你惹了什么麻烦，被将军逮住了呢！本来还盘算怎么搭救你，闹了半天，原来你们早就认识哇。
t_en: You scared the heck outta me! For a second I thought you'd annoyed the general — it seemed like you were his prisoner. There I was thinking up a plan to kidnap you, and it turns out the two of you are old buddies!

t_ch: 之前就想问了，你怎么突然下车过来了啊。
t_en: Soooo what made you suddenly decide to come down from the Express?

t_ch: 我担心你们的安全。
t_en: I was worried for your safety.

t_ch: 哇，我有感动到！但有{NICKNAME}和杨叔在，你还不放心嘛！你瞧，咱们这一路帮忙，帮着帮着就快成仙舟的大英雄了。
t_en: Aww, how sweet! Buuuut {NICKNAME}, Mr. Yang, and I have been holding our own — we're pretty much Xianzhou heroes at this point.

t_ch: 我懂我懂，要是为难就不说了。谁还没点自己的秘密嘛。何况现在也不是刨根挖地满足好奇心的时候。
t_en: Okay, okay, I won't push you — everyone has their secrets. Besides, given the circumstances, my curiosity can wait.

t_ch: 丹恒，你能来，真是太好了！
t_en: Anyway, it's great to have you with us, Dan Heng!

t_ch: 饮月君…的转世，丹恒，对吧？我听过你的名字。
t_en: Imbibitor Lunae's reincarnation... Dan Heng, correct? I have heard your name before.

t_ch: 不可能，我的名字被抹去了…
t_en: How can that be, my name was erased...

t_ch: 为什么要记流放者的名字？
t_en: Why would the names of the banished be recorded?

t_ch: 你的名字只是被十王司从公众面前抹去了。但身为太卜，本座知道、也应当知道罗浮上的陈年公案、旧事秘辛，以备不时之需。
t_en: Your name was only erased from the public eye. But as the master diviner, I know — and should know — all the records of years gone by... Such archives are of great importance in times of need.

t_ch: 你作为「云上五骁」的英雄大放异彩时，我还没出生呢。亲眼见到当年的传奇……
t_en: I was not born in the heroic and extraordinary era of the High-Cloud Quintet. To have seen those legends with my own eyes...

t_ch: 怎么样？
t_en: Go on...

t_ch: 你和绘影图形里记录的样子所差无几，持明的转生真的会让人蜕变新生吗？
t_en: Your appearance closely matches the depiction in the annals... Does Vidyadhara reincarnation really entail a complete transformation — a new life?

t_ch: 我知道你会来的，因为提到仙舟时，你的眼神有着强烈的悲伤。
t_en: I knew you'd come. When we first mentioned the Xianzhou, there was a sad look in your eyes.

t_ch: 他们放逐了你，但罗浮还是你的家乡。
t_en: They may have banished you, but the Luofu is still your home.

t_ch: 多谢你们一路的照顾…
t_en: Thanks for all your help along the way...

t_ch: 很抱歉，我从未提起…
t_en: I'm sorry I never spoke up...

t_ch: 你是列车组的一员，丹恒。赶紧把事情解决吧，我们还要继续旅行呢。
t_en: You're a member of the Express Crew, Dan Heng. Let's settle this matter as soon as possible — our journey doesn't end here.

t_ch: 这么一说，这雕像和你确实没那么像……
t_en: Y'know, the more I look at this statue, the less "Dan-Hengy" it gets...

t_ch: 不过酷酷的气质倒是一脉相承，哈哈。
t_en: Still, it's got the same stony expression, haha.

t_ch: 虽然窥探持明的秘密有些不妥……
t_en: Perhaps it is a little inappropriate of me to pry into the secrets of the Vidyadhara...

t_ch: 但，你和绘影图形里记录的样子所差无几，持明的转生真的会让人重获新生吗？
t_en: ...but your appearance closely matches the depiction in the annals... Does Vidyadhara reincarnation really entail a complete transformation — a new life?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}、三月一路上都在嚷嚷，要是你也在就好了。
t_en: *sigh* Those two haven't exactly been on their best behavior... It would've been good to have you here earlier.

t_ch: 来到这个地方，记忆可有松动？
t_en: Has coming here triggered your memory?

t_ch: 解开禁制吧，你身负的力量便是打开通往「建木」之路的钥匙。
t_en: Release your full potential — the power you carry is the key to opening a way through to the Ambrosial Arbor.

t_ch: 将军与您还有要事相商。请留步。
t_en: The general still has important matters to discuss with you. Please remain here.

t_ch: 切断与鳞渊境的感应。
t_en: Cut off the spiritual link with Scalegorge Waterscape.

t_ch: 符玄正向云骑布置因应的方略，还是不要打扰她为好。
t_en: Fu Xuan is currently laying out war plans with the Cloud Knights. It's best not to interrupt her right now.

t_ch: 水底竟有这么多建筑…难怪典籍记载鳞渊境曾是持明龙宫的所在。
t_en: The annals mention that Scalegorge Waterscape was once the location of Dragon Palace. Small wonder — look at all these submerged structures...

t_ch: 倏忽之乱时，我有幸躬逢其盛，目睹过这一奇景。山移海转，宫城空墟…持明族以故土圣地囚禁建木，罗浮仙舟实在亏欠他们良多。
t_en: I was fortunate enough to be here during The Shuhu Upheaval period — I witnessed this place in its prime. An age past — the palace was left in ruins, and the Vidyadhara used their sacred homeland to imprison the Arbor. The Luofu and the Xianzhou are greatly indebted to them.

t_ch: 符卿。
t_en: Lady Fu.

t_ch: 我在。
t_en: Here, general.

t_ch: 你留在这里，率云骑镇守这条通道，以免另有事端。
t_en: Remain here — lead the Cloud Knights in defense of this passage. We must prevent further incidents.

t_ch: 景元…将军，你要独自去对付幻胧？
t_en: Jing Yuan... General, are you planning to face Phantylia alone?

t_ch: 倒也谈不上独自一人，还有朋友同行。
t_en: I wouldn't say so, I'll be counting on a few friends for support.

t_ch: 将军！我们也愿随将军同去！请将军不要撇下我等！
t_en: General! Don't cast us aside! We're willing to go with you!

t_ch: 是啊，将军。我们虽然本事低微，但云骑军卫蔽仙舟的职责在身，岂有呆在后方，反而让异乡旅客为我们冒险的道理！如果不嫌弃，请让我来为各位开路。
t_en: Yes, General! We may not be the mightiest force, but it's our duty as Cloud Knights to protect the Xianzhou — how can we let outworlders face the danger while we stay behind the lines!? With your permission, sir, allow me to lead the way.

t_ch: 诸位，你们的心意我很清楚。
t_en: I understand your sentiment, soldiers...

t_ch: 但前方的对手并非丰饶孽物…而是反物质军团的「绝灭大君」。过了这条道后，就是{RUBY_B#岚}帝弓司命{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#纳努克}烬灭祸祖{RUBY_E#}的对垒了……
t_en: ...but the adversary ahead of us is not an Abomination of Abundance. They are a Lord Ravager of the Antimatter Legion. Crossing this line will bring you into the conflict between the {RUBY_B#Lan}Reignbow Arbiter{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Nanook}the Ruin Author{RUBY_E#}...

t_ch: 你们有更重要的职责。云骑军听令！
t_en: You have a more important duty. Cloud Knights, attention!

t_ch: 我深入「建木」后，若海水恢复原状，便立刻撤离，重新闭锁洞天。一切事宜听从太卜安排。
t_en: After I enter the Ambrosial Arbor, and if the seawater returns to its original state, you must withdraw immediately and seal off the delve once more. The Master Diviner will lead you.

t_ch: 是！
t_en: Yes, general!

t_ch: 符卿，若我无法返回，将始末因果呈报给其他仙舟的重任，交托给你了。
t_en: Lady Fu, if I am unable to return, I entrust you with the important task of relaying the full account to the other Xianzhou ships.

t_ch: …我不会说什么「请亲自回来述职」之类的话。你吩咐的，我定不辱使命。
t_en: ...I trust you will be here to re-issue the order in person... but whatever the outcome, I will do as you command and honor the mission.

t_ch: 哈，有几分将军的意思了。
t_en: Ha, spoken like a true general.

t_ch: 这台阶跨度还挺大，哎嘿，让我找个台阶下……
t_en: Phew, these steps are so far apart. Gotta find a way down...

t_ch: 这么大个宫殿，说放弃就放弃了…换了我，得心疼好几个礼拜呢。
t_en: What a huge palace — completely abandoned... That must have been difficult for them — imagine how upset you'd be if you had to abandon me!

t_ch: 对持明而言，这牺牲恐怕是不得不为之的……
t_en: For the Vidyadhara, it must have been a necessary sacrifice.

t_ch: 用鳞渊境来封印建木？背叛！此乃大不敬！
t_en: Use Scalegorge Waterscape to seal the Arbor? Treason! Blasphemy!

t_ch: 你疯了！你以为这能换取仙舟人的信任？非我族类，永远不可能同心一致！
t_en: You've lost your senses! You think this will gain the trust of the Xianzhou natives? Those who are not of our kind can never be of our mind!

t_ch: 长老的意思我已了解，但我意已决，不容更迭。
t_en: I understand your misgivings, but my decision is made. That is the course we must take.

t_ch: 好…好，我会呈报龙师们，褫夺你龙尊的名号与力量！
t_en: I... very well. In that case, I will report you to the Preceptors and have you stripped of the name and power of the high elder.

t_ch: 这是…最初接受了镇压建木使命的那位龙尊……
t_en: This must be... the first high elder that accepted the mission to quell the Ambrosial Arbor...

t_ch: 按照传统，从此以后，历任龙尊都要重返显龙大雩殿，在这儿引导古海之潮，守望并加固「建木」的封印。
t_en: According to tradition, from then on, successive high elders were obliged to return to the Dragonvista Rain Hall. They would guide the tides of the ancient sea to guard and strengthen the Arbor's seal.

t_ch: 你想起来了？
t_en: Do you remember now?

t_ch: 是，「叩祝三爪，朝觐尺木」…通往玄根深处的道路便会打开。
t_en: Yes, "reverence to the three talons, the path to the great roots..." It's the way to the root depths.

t_ch: 这是什么谜语吗？「叩祝三爪」…什么意思啊？
t_en: Is that some kind of riddle? "Reverence to the three talons..." What the heck does that mean?

t_ch: 不必担心，随我来便是。
t_en: Don't worry about it, just follow me.

t_ch: 那是什么！是龙吗？
t_en: Is that a dragon!?

t_ch: 咱们已经到走到尽头了，这里便是「建木玄根」，丰饶神迹的所在之处。
t_en: We've reached the end. These are the roots of the Ambrosial Arbor, where the vestiges of Abundance lie.

t_ch: 「叩祝三爪，朝觐尺木」，指的便是这里。受龙力遏制，建木玄根成了龙形木瘿的姿态。
t_en: "Reverence to the three talons, the path to the great roots..." This is it. Under the power of the high elder, the Arbor's roots have formed into the image of a dragon.

t_ch: 现在，我会揭开这最后的封印……
t_en: Now, I will break the final seal...

t_ch: 各位想必都准备好了吧？
t_en: I hope everyone is prepared?

t_ch: 你带我来这儿，教你的族人知道，就麻烦大了。
t_en: If your people knew that you had brought me here, there would be great unrest.

t_ch: 他们不会知道。闭嘴，应星，现在你我扯平了。给你一个时辰，尽你所能地研究吧。记住，只有一个时辰。
t_en: They will never know. Keep quiet, Yingxing — this will make us even. I will give you two hours — research what you can. Remember — two hours.

t_ch: 我可是短生种啊，你觉得一个时辰很少？对我来说，那就足够了。
t_en: I'm a short-life species, do you think two hours isn't enough? It will be done.
Hmph...

t_ch: 是「丹枫」，是他的声音…另一个人是谁？很熟悉，好熟悉啊……
t_en: That's Dan Feng's voice... but what about the other person? So familiar...

t_ch: 可以了吧，将军。
t_en: That should do, general.

t_ch: 哦，够了，够了。
t_en: Mm, enough.

t_ch: 哈哈，龙师不必紧张，我与十王司只是走走形式罢了。
t_en: Haha, don't be nervous sir, this is a mere formality for me and the Ten-Lords Commission.

t_ch: 「建木」的封印关系重大，必须确保它的安全。
t_en: This is of vital importance to the Ambrosial Arbor's seals — safety must be guaranteed.

t_ch: 镇压「建木」是持明的责任。
t_en: Quelling the Arbor is the duty of the Vidyadhara.

t_ch: 那么谨记，这一代不允许重蹈前代龙尊的覆辙。
t_en: Keep in mind, this generation cannot afford to repeat the failure of the previous high elder.
...Of course.

t_ch: 云骑将军和十王司。他们会定期来检查鳞渊境……
t_en: The Cloud Knight general and the Ten-Lords Commission. They performed regular inspections of Scalegorge Waterscape...

t_ch: 你是什么人？！
t_en: Who are you!?

t_ch: …丹枫说，只有龙尊才能进入这里啊。
t_en: ...Dan Feng said only the high elder can enter here.

t_ch: 那叛徒早已死了。你是谁？想对龙尊大人做什么！
t_en: That traitor is already dead. Who are you? What do you want with the high elder?

t_ch: 做什么？
t_en: What do I want?

t_ch: 我想看看她…只是想看看她现在过得如何…只是想看看她啊！！
t_en: I want to see her... see how she's faring... I want to see her!

t_ch: 神秘的入侵者？可是，这个声音也好熟悉……
t_en: A mysterious intruder... but that voice is so familiar...

t_ch: 少主大人，咱们真的要抛下鳞渊境吗？
t_en: Young master, must we really forsake Scalegorge Waterscape?

t_ch: …月宴，你们会怪我吗？
t_en: ...Can you forgive me, Yueyan?

t_ch: 少主大人，我说不上来。虽然心底有些怨，但总觉得…有些说不出来的感受。
t_en: I cannot say, young master. I feel resentment in my heart, but there are also... feelings I cannot put into words.

t_ch: 长老说，咱们很久以前也不是生活在仙舟上的，是仙舟给了我们栖身之地。现在，是回报他们的时候了吧？
t_en: The senior Vidyadhara say that the Xianzhou offered us this place — that we hail from another world. Is it time to repay them?

t_ch: 是回报他们的时候了。
t_en: It is time to repay them.

t_ch: 成了。
t_en: It worked.

t_ch: 这便是所谓「叩祝三爪」中的一处，消解此地封印，便能向玄根再进一步。
t_en: This is one of the places mentioned in the riddle — one of the three talons. If we can break the seal here, we'll be a step closer to the roots of the Arbor.

t_ch: 好了，前往第三处封印吧。
t_en: Okay, let's head to the third seal.

t_ch: 此处的封印…早在建木重生前已然摇摇欲坠了。
t_en: ...This seal was already on the verge of breaking before the Ambrosial Arbor's resurrection.

t_ch: 三爪叩拜已毕，接下来，该是前往「建木」玄根的时候了。
t_en: The reverence to the three talons is complete... now we must head for the roots of the Arbor.

t_ch: 这便是「三爪」中的最后一处。
t_en: The last of the three talons is here.

t_ch: 这是什么？
t_en: What is this?

t_ch: 三月小姐，你最好不要乱碰这些持明。
t_en: Miss March, I would advise you to refrain from interfering with the Vidyadhara.

t_ch: 持明？哎？这些「珍珠」是持明？
t_en: Huh? The Vidyadhara? You mean these pearls will turn into people?

t_ch: 持明族寿尽时，会重返古海结卵，再以幼体蜕生出水。
t_en: When the life of a Vidyadhara is over, they return to the ancient sea and form a shell, before emerging anew. This is the hatching rebirth cycle.

t_ch: …不可思议。
t_en: ...Whoaaaa...

t_ch: …各位，我回来了。
t_en: ...Brothers, sisters, I have returned.

t_ch: 虽有长存不灭之身，亦不能逃脱轮回之苦。
t_en: Though the body be immortal, the pain of reincarnation is inescapable.

t_ch: 往生之业，犹如今世枷锁…
t_en: The karma of past lives chains the world of the present...

t_ch: 这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
t_en: The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.

t_ch: 一只带蹼的小手轻轻压在珍珠质地、半透明的晶壳上，若隐若现。你略带好奇地将手指放在这只小手上，隔着晶壳，彼此相对。
t_en: A small webbed hand can be faintly seen inside lightly pressing against its pearlescent, translucent shell. You press your fingers up against the outline of the small hand, your touch only separated by the crystal shell.

t_ch: 古海波涛声摇晃，与某人立下的誓言在耳畔呢喃，星空彼端的光芒眨了眨眼，你沉入目眩神醉的温暖爱河里……
t_en: The ancient sea's waves sway. Someone whispers their vows to you in your ear. The light at the end of the starry sky shimmers, and you sink into the warm and intoxicating river of love...

t_ch: 那是某个持明前世的记忆，很快它就将随逝水流去。
t_en: That is the memory of a Vidyadhara's past life, soon to flow away as does water down a river.

t_ch: 这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
t_en: The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.

t_ch: 它被一朵巨大的珊瑚承托着，宛若婴儿在摇篮里渴睡。
t_en: The egg is nestled atop a hulking shelf of coral, like a child dozing in its cradle.

t_ch: 你轻轻将手放在晶壳上，一个梦泡泡在你耳旁绽开。你瞬间明白，珍珠里的孩子渴望成为一名绘制瑰丽丹青的画师。
t_en: You gently place your hand on the crystal shell, and a dream bubble blooms near your ear. In a moment, you understand that the child in the pearl desires to become a painter who creates brilliant paintings.

t_ch: 这是蜕生前的旧梦，还是未出世的宏愿？你不清楚。也许很快，这个梦将随逝水流去。
t_en: Is this an old dream from before its rebirth, or an as-yet unfulfilled aspiration? You are unsure. Perhaps soon, this dream will fade away with the flowing water.

t_ch: 这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵下，一点闪光抓住了你的眼睛。
t_en: Beneath this crystal clear, luminous egg, a glimmer catches your eye.

t_ch: 你伸手，那是一颗沙砾般细小的珠子。与持明卵相较，它如此渺小，像是伤心人梦中眼角垂下的泪。
t_en: You reach out your hand and see a tiny pearl, so small and minuscule compared to the shimmering egg. The pearl reminds one of a tear shed from the eye of a heartbroken dreamer.

t_ch: 不知这位持明蜕生前有什么舍不下的心结？无论如何，它最终都成了磨灭不去的悲伤，被你握在掌心。
t_en: Perhaps this Vidyadhara once had something they couldn't bear to part with prior to their rebirth. But now it has become an eternal sadness, which is held in the palm of your hand.

t_ch: 看来，虽然「建木」近在咫尺了，但若不能完成仪式，我们便无法靠近。
t_en: The Arbor is near, but if we can't complete this ceremony then we won't be able to get close.

t_ch: 幻胧染指「建木」在即…诸位，必须抓紧时间了。
t_en: Phantylia will soon have control of the Arbor... Quickly.

t_ch: 「建木」的根须在不断滋长…
t_en: The roots of the Arbor are still growing...

t_ch: 是幻胧…我们得快些了。
t_en: It's Phantylia... we must hurry.

t_ch: 看到这些，你想起了什么吗？
t_en: When you see this, do you remember anything?

t_ch: 有一些…但都是些碎片。
t_en: A little... only fragments.

t_ch: 不明质地的石料上雕琢着几乎已被磨灭的纹路，似是某种失落的文字，即便联觉信标也无法解读。
t_en: Carved onto the indeterminate stone is a pattern resembling a lost script, nearly faded away, and unable to be deciphered even by the Synesthesia Beacon.

t_ch: 你盯着它片刻，这些纹路在你脑海中舒展开来，有了意义。
t_en: You gaze at it for a moment, and the lines unfold in your mind, giving them meaning.

t_ch: 「龙吟阗阗，垂云翻卷。沧溟开晦，若木发蘖。」
t_en: "The dragon's roar echoes, and the whirling clouds twirl. The sea opens its maws, as the dead Arbor sprouts."

t_ch: 仿佛经历过剧烈的地质运动，数人合围的柱石被某种巨力摧折，半埋于土砂之间。
t_en: As if struck by some intense geological movement, the pillars were shattered by a great force, causing the people nearby to become half-buried in dirt and sand.

t_ch: 不知为何，你依稀能看到这些废墟曾经壮丽的模样，就像它从未倒塌一般。
t_en: You do not know why, yet for some reason you are able to faintly envision the magnificent appearance of these ruins as if they had never fallen.

t_ch: 你拂袖轻抚古老的遗迹，手上的细砂如玉屑般白皙莹然，轻轻律动，仿如有生。
t_en: You gently caress the ancient ruins with a sleeve. The fine sand upon your hand is as white and translucent as jade shards, pulsing as if they were alive.

t_ch: 对了将军，停云小姐的…事情，你应该听说了吧？
t_en: General, did you... hear about Miss Tingyun...?

t_ch: 我从符卿处收到了报告。幻胧潜伏之深，处心积虑，实在令人防不胜防。
t_en: I received word from Lady Fu. The depth of Phantylia's infiltration, along with her meticulous planning, makes her extremely difficult to guard against.

t_ch: 事后云骑会展开调查，当务之急要先瓦解幻胧的图谋。
t_en: The Cloud Knights will carry out an investigation, but for now our most pressing matter is to put a stop to Phantylia's scheme.

t_ch: 所谓的「封印」，是指这些造型古怪的石灯吗？
t_en: Those seals you mentioned — do you mean these weird-looking stone lanterns?

t_ch: 是啊，我依稀记得需要依序触碰石灯，来逆转此地的封印。
t_en: That's right. From what I recall, we have to touch these stone lanterns in a particular sequence to unlock the seals in this area.

t_ch: 那就有劳你了？
t_en: In that case then, I'll leave it to you.

t_ch: 我…试试。
t_en: I'll... do my best.

t_ch: 怎么了，老朋友？感觉你对封印似乎没什么头绪啊…
t_en: What seems to be the problem, friend? It would appear the seals have you at a loss.

t_ch: 不知这周遭的壁画是否与封印有关？
t_en: Could the murals in our vicinity be related to the seals?

t_ch: 仔细瞧瞧，这些石灯的底座与底座之间，好像有差别呢…
t_en: Hey, check it out. The bases of these stone lanterns are different...

t_ch: 前方有孽物盘踞。诸位，当心了。
t_en: There are abominations up ahead. Careful, everyone.

t_ch: 刚才那头巨兽的脚下踩着一块石板，不知是否和这儿的封印有关…
t_en: Hmm... Did you notice the flagstone the creature was stepping on? I wonder if it has any connection to the seal...

t_ch: 这壁画倒是挺有意思的…似乎完全不受时间侵蚀。
t_en: This mural is pretty interesting... Looks like time hasn't had any effect on it.

t_ch: 这幅壁画应该与周遭其他几幅有所联系，讲述持明族轮回一世的过程，自古海中蜕生，又结卵归于古海。
t_en: This mural must be related to the others here. It tells the story of the Vidyadhara self-reincarnation, from hatching rebirth in the ancient sea, to the return to that same sea as the cycle begins again.

t_ch: 不知道这和封印有没有关系？
t_en: Hey, do you think this could be related to the seals?

t_ch: 也许有关。
t_en: Perhaps.

t_ch: 「也许」…嗯，我能理解搜肠刮肚很让人为难啦，因为我也是什么都想不起来。
t_en: Perhaps...? Fair enough, it's tough racking your brains all the time — I'm struggling to keep track...

t_ch: 「持明遗卵，浴月沐华。古海泱泱，浴月复生。」……
t_en: "Beneath the lunar glow adorned, Vidyadhara eggs begin to form, and from the ancient sea rebirthed, to walk again on solid earth."

t_ch: 这画上描述的…是持明族之卵在波月古海蜕生，再世为人的开端。
t_en: This mural describes the Vidyadhara hatching rebirth in the Lunarescent Depths — the beginning of self-reincarnation.

t_ch: 「持明稚童，故人提执。前世贤契，来世蒙师。」……
t_en: "Our reincarnation's greatest cost, the wisdom of a past life lost, yet through the teachings of our kind, unto the young again consigned."

t_ch: 这里描绘的是持明族蜕生后，受年长同胞提携启蒙的成长岁月。
t_en: The mural depicts the Vidyadhara being guided by their elder, wiser kin after their rebirth.

t_ch: 「持明俣俣，云吟水舞。苍龙于飞，各有所归。」……
t_en: "Our people sing the hymn of clouds, and dance to water's cherished sounds, and high above the dragon flies, to each is destined different skies."

t_ch: 这幅壁画描绘的是…持明所学有成，散入仙舟各处，为联盟效力的壮年期。
t_en: This mural portrays the Vidyadhara young. They acquire knowledge and depart for different places on the Xianzhou — thereby dedicating themselves to serving the Alliance.

t_ch: 「持明其耋，独行景景。波月粼粼，沧海沉珠。」……
t_en: "And as the day is almost gone, return alone to water's song, beneath the waves in silver shell, await new life that time will tell."

t_ch: 光阴流转，凡七百余载后，持明龙裔大限将至，又将再度结成龙卵，眠于古海下，静候下一世蜕生。
t_en: The worldly limit of the Vidyadhara is reached after seven centuries. They return to the ancient sea and form a shell — awaiting the next hatching rebirth.

t_ch: 刚才是哪个小坏蛋想要找我来着？
t_en: Now, which of you little creatures wished to see me, hmm?

t_ch: 怎么这会儿没了动静？
t_en: My, it's gone a little quiet...

t_ch: 幻胧…她在做什么？
t_en: Phantylia... What is she doing?

t_ch: 「药师」的神迹吗？确实不赖……
t_en: The miracles of Yaoshi? Aren't they fine...

t_ch: 越「丰饶」的世界，越有「毁灭」的价值，不是吗？
t_en: The more abundant a world becomes, the greater the value of its destruction, wouldn't you say?

t_ch: 诸位，这就是「丰饶」与「毁灭」结合的力量！
t_en: Witness the power of Abundance and Destruction combined!

t_ch: 原来如此，这种矛盾的对立统一，「丰饶」与「毁灭」的碰撞，亦有毁灭之美……
t_en: I see now... this diametric unity of opposites, this collision of Abundance and Destruction, is yet another form of destructive beauty...

t_ch: 仙舟联盟…你们就从来没想过会成为军团的目标吗？难道你们以为联盟势大，负创神就不敢对你们出手吗？
t_en: The Xianzhou Alliance... Did it never cross your mind that you would become a target of the Legion? You thought the Alliance too powerful for The Blemished One to strike?

t_ch: 错了，错了！要知道，为了抢到毁灭联盟的殊荣，大君之间还发生过争斗呢！
t_en: You were wrong! You should know that we Ravagers fought each other for the honor of destroying the Alliance!

t_ch: 宇宙的一切都将以毁灭作结，「丰饶」与「巡猎」也不例外……
t_en: The universe will end in destruction, and with it the Abundance and The Hunt will disappear...

t_ch: 以纯粹的力量毁灭你们，那是焚风的美学。我不会这么做。
t_en: Zephyro wished to destroy you with brute force... but that is not my way.

t_ch: 我想要的，是你们绝望、痛苦、猜忌、崩溃、亲手毁掉自己造就的珍爱！
t_en: I wish for you to despair, suffer, crumble, turn on one another, and destroy that which you love with your own hands!

t_ch: 来吧，仙舟的将军。看看岚那微不足道的力量与最不爱争斗的我，孰高孰低？
t_en: Come, general of Xianzhou. Witness how Lan's power pales in the face of that which they most fear to confront... Witness your weakness.

t_ch: 唔？嘻嘻，来者是罗浮的将军吗？
t_en: Oh? Hee-hee, has the general of the Luofu chosen to grace me with his presence?

t_ch: 那个坏东西！果然在这儿等着咱们。出来啊，幻胧！
t_en: That witch! She was here waiting for us the whole time. Show yourself, Phantylia!

t_ch: 「恩公」也来了？切莫心急，「小女子」还未梳妆完毕呢。
t_en: And the benefactors, too? Patience, patience, let me make myself presentable...

t_ch: 将军你…没事吧？
t_en: General, are you... okay?

t_ch: 还撑得住。
t_en: I'm still alive.

t_ch: 看来咱们过去的默契还没有消失啊……
t_en: ...And it would seem the two of us can still coordinate our efforts.

t_ch: 幻胧…真是个可怕的敌人。若不是她想将「毁灭」的力量注入我身体，把我转变成虚卒。胜负恐怕还在未定之数。
t_en: *sigh* Phantylia... a truly fearsome enemy. If she hadn't attempted to turn me into a pawn of Destruction, I'm afraid victory would have been far from certain.

t_ch: 多亏丹恒那恰到好处的一枪，重创了与我紧密连接的幻胧，也切断了她和建木的联结。
t_en: Phantylia had established a link between me and herself. Your well-timed strike gravely injured her — thus, her connection to the Arbor was severed.

t_ch: 原来如此！丹恒拿枪刺你的时候，可把我吓坏了…
t_en: So it was all part of the plan! When Dan Heng stabbed you, I was scared to death...

t_ch: 幻胧…还活着吗？
t_en: Is Phantylia... still alive?

t_ch: 那东西…死了吧？
t_en: Is that thing... dead?

t_ch: 很遗憾，「毁灭」的令使是不会轻易被毁灭的，不过……
t_en: It takes more than that to destroy an Emanator of Destruction. Still...

t_ch: 幻胧短时间内无力兴风作浪，也不必担心它再染指「建木」。只是封印星核的工作还需要花上些时日……
t_en: Phantylia won't be stirring up trouble any time soon — don't worry about her infecting the Arbor again. It's just that sealing the Stellaron is going to take some time...

t_ch: 这些事，就留给符卿来操心好了…我只觉得…有些困倦……
t_en: Leave that to the master diviner... I'm afraid I may be... somewhat spent...

t_ch: 将军，睁大眼睛，现在可千万不能睡着啊！
t_en: General, keep those eyes open, now's not the time to fall asleep!

t_ch: 喂！醒醒呀——
t_en: Hey! Wake up...

t_ch: 片刻后，你们唤来了符玄与云骑军。星槎载着你们飞向长乐天。
t_en: A few moments later, Fu Xuan and the Clouds Knights arrived. A starskiff was ready to take you all to Exalting Sanctum.

t_ch: 我听过你的恶名，饮月君。
t_en: I've heard of you, Imbibitor Lunae...

t_ch: 真想不到，除去星核猎手，竟还有一名重犯混入仙舟……
t_en: First it was the Stellaron Hunters, now an exiled criminal has infiltrated the Xianzhou...

t_ch: …我无意挑起争端。来到仙舟，只为确认朋友安全。
t_en: ...I have no interest in stoking conflict. I came to ensure the safety of my friends.

t_ch: 狡辩之词，进幽囚狱再说也不迟。
t_en: Save your excuses for the Shackling Prison.

t_ch: …让开！
t_en: Out of the way!

t_ch: 很好，很好，就是这样！饮月，你恐怕再也见不着你的朋友了…
t_en: Hahaha, better, but I'm afraid you won't be seeing your friends.

t_ch: 他们此刻正身陷苦战呢。
t_en: They're caught in their own bitter struggle.

t_ch: 闭嘴，你也休想离开！
t_en: Silence! You're not getting away either!

t_ch: …好啊，那就再添把火吧。卡芙卡！
t_en: ...Is that so? Let's heat things up then. Kafka!

t_ch: 嗯，阿刃，<color=#dbc291ff>听我说</color>，解开「束缚」吧。
t_en: Bladie, <color=#dbc291ff>listen to me:</color> Unleash the mara.

t_ch: …那么，开始吧！
t_en: ... So it begins.

t_ch: 速速投降！
t_en: Surrender!

t_ch: 饮月，你软弱了。
t_en: Haha, your strength has waned.

t_ch: 怎么，面对这小子，下不了重手？
t_en: What's wrong, afraid to hurt the boy?

t_ch: 口出狂言！
t_en: Quiet!

t_ch: （不知三月他们到底情况如何…）
t_en: (I wonder if the others are okay...)

t_ch: （必须速战速决…）
t_en: (Gotta make this quick...)

t_ch: 你们俩确实棘手。
t_en: You two just won't give up...

t_ch: 看来要留下你们，非得用上这招了！
t_en: I only have one choice...

t_ch: 这一剑…真眼熟啊。
t_en: ...So familiar.

t_ch: 是那个女人教你的？
t_en: Did she teach you?

t_ch: 那你只有死路一条了！
t_en: Then you deserve no mercy!

t_ch: （不能再拖延了…）
t_en: (Can't delay any longer...)

t_ch: 我本不欲大动干戈，但眼下别无他法…抱歉。
t_en: *long sigh* I didn't wish to harm anyone... But there's no other way. Forgive me.

t_ch: 我还能…再战…
t_en: This... isn't over...

t_ch: 列位，瞧见这具美丽的肉身了吗…「丰饶」神迹，名不虚传。
t_en: Benefactors, behold this beautiful body... The miracles of Abundance live up to the name.

t_ch: 让我看看，能用她做些什么。
t_en: Let's see if I can put it to good use.

t_ch: 很好，就用这赐予仙舟长生的力量，为你们带来「毁灭」吧！
t_en: The very power that brought the Xianzhou long life, I will use to bring it destruction!

t_ch: 幻胧已攫取建木的力量为己所用…
t_en: Phantylia has usurped the power of the Arbor...
